sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 141:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 141:1
items.html: The Vav of the Hey of the coupling of Bina that descended to Yesod is the male of Yesod, and the light of Malchut that received from the residue of Hod is the female. (Item 54)
